name: fietsnav
description: Personal bike navigation along real cycle paths, ferries and the Dutch node network (knooppunten).

scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check sw.js && node test/smoke.test.js
scripts.native:prep: mkdir -p www && cp index.html app.js sw.js manifest.webmanifest icon-192.png icon-512.png www/
scripts.cap:add: npx cap add ios && npx cap add android
scripts.cap:sync: npm run native:prep && npx cap sync
